rulings.Case Title: MASAZUMI INOUE VS. PREFERRED MORTGAGE SERVICES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Mortgage Electronic Registration Systems, Inc., Bank Of America, N.A., And Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.'S Motion For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 18, 2018 line 1. Defendants Mortgage Electronic Registration Systems, Inc., Bank Of America, N.A., And Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.'S Motion For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication DENIED. Moving party failed to shift its burden and show that Defendants are entitled to a judgment as a matter of law. Defendants failed to show that in 2011 MERS was a beneficiary or a nominee for then-holder beneficiary under the DOT (and holder of the note). Additionally, there is a triable issue of fact regarding MERS authority to assign DOT (and Note) to Bank of America in 2011.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GEORGINA MUNOZ VS. ENRICO HERNANDEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition And Document Production, And For Sanctions And Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 18, 2018 line 2. PLAINTIFF GEORGINA MUNOZ's Motion To Compel Deposition And Document Production, And For Sanctions GRANTED. Parties to meet and confer of the date of deposition to take place no later than January 24, 2018. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,450. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID JARAMILLO ET AL VS. BALWANTSINH THAKOR ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Of Defendants
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 18, 2018 line 5. DEFENDANTs BALWANTSINH THAKOR and SHREE JALARAM HOTEL LP's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Of Defendants Hearing Required to address the (1) scope of release; (2) damages caused by fraud/breach of settlement; and (3) issue splitting between action seeking specific performance re: possessory rights and action seeking damages re: possessory rights. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: STEAM LABS, INC. VS. MASASHI TAKAHASHI TAKAHASHI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Margaret Takahashi And Masashi Takahashi'S Demurrer To Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 18, 2018 line 8. Defendants Margaret Takahashi And Masashi Takahashi'S Demurrer To Complaint sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to address all issues raised by demurrer. rulings.Case Title: PACIFIC ARMS GOUGH STREET LLC VS. STEPHEN CAMPBELL ET AL (case is now regular civil case)
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 18, 2018 line 9. DEFENDANT MAXWELL MCINTIRE's Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment OFF CALENDAR. Insufficient notice per CCP 1005. Motion filed and served on January 12, 2018 and set for hearing for January 18, 2018.No Order Shortening Time on file. = (501/REQ)
